records.question: What operate companies have flights piloted by Peterson with vehicle flight number M2-F1 #39 at Amsterdam airport where the iata is AMS and icao is EHAM and the altitude is at most 3650.0?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT operate_company.id FROM operate_company
JOIN flight ON operate_company.id = flight.company_id
JOIN airport ON flight.airport_id = airport.id
WHERE airport.iata = 'AMS' AND flight.altitude <= 3650.0 AND flight.vehicle_flight_number = 'M2-F1 #39' AND airport.icao = 'EHAM' AND flight.pilot = 'Peterson'
records.pred_sql: SELECT T1.id FROM operate_company AS T1 INNER JOIN flight AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.company_id INNER JOIN airport AS T3 ON T2.airport_id = T3.id WHERE T2.Pilot = 'Peterson' AND T2.Vehicle_Flight_number = 'M2-F1 #39' AND T3.name = 'Amsterdam airport' AND T3.IATA = 'AMS' AND T3.ICAO = 'EHAM' AND T2.Altitude <= 3650.0

records.question: Which operate companies are joint ventures with a 40.0 group equity shareholding, focus on Catering services, and have flights at exactly 3650.0 altitude and at least 240.0 velocity connected to airports in Amsterdam, Netherlands?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT operate_company.id FROM operate_company
JOIN flight ON operate_company.id = flight.company_id
JOIN airport ON flight.airport_id = airport.id
WHERE operate_company.type = 'Joint Venture' AND operate_company.group_equity_shareholding = 40.0 AND airport.city = 'Amsterdam' AND flight.velocity >= 240.0 AND operate_company.principal_activities = 'Catering services' AND airport.country = 'Netherlands' AND flight.altitude = 3650.0
records.pred_sql: SELECT T1.id FROM operate_company AS T1 INNER JOIN flight AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.company_id INNER JOIN airport AS T3 ON T2.airport_id = T3.id WHERE T1.Group_Equity_Shareholding = 40.0 AND T1.Principal_activities LIKE '%Catering services%' AND T2.Altitude = 3650.0 AND T2.Velocity >= 240.0 AND T3.City = 'Amsterdam' AND T3.Country = 'Netherlands'

records.question: Which operate companies that have flights are exactly focused on Airline activities?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT operate_company.id FROM operate_company
JOIN flight ON operate_company.id = flight.company_id
WHERE operate_company.principal_activities = 'Airline'
records.pred_sql: SELECT T1.id FROM operate_company AS T1 JOIN flight AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.company_id WHERE T1.Principal_activities = 'Airline'

records.question: Which operate companies have a group equity shareholding that is exactly 100.0 and are connected to flights at any airport?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT operate_company.id FROM operate_company
JOIN flight ON operate_company.id = flight.company_id
JOIN airport ON flight.airport_id = airport.id
WHERE operate_company.group_equity_shareholding = 100.0
records.pred_sql: SELECT T1.id FROM operate_company AS T1 WHERE T1.Group_Equity_Shareholding = 100.0 AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM flight AS T2 WHERE T2.company_id = T1.id )

records.question: Which operate companies named VN/CX Catering Services Limited are incorporated in Vietnam, focus on Catering services, are Joint Ventures, and have a group equity shareholding of at least 40.0?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT operate_company.id FROM operate_company
WHERE operate_company.name = 'VN/CX Catering Services Limited' AND operate_company.incorporated_in = 'Vietnam' AND operate_company.principal_activities = 'Catering services' AND operate_company.type = 'Joint Venture' AND operate_company.group_equity_shareholding >= 40.0
records.pred_sql: SELECT id FROM operate_company WHERE name = 'VN/CX Catering Services Limited' AND Incorporated_in = 'Vietnam' AND Principal_activities = 'Catering services' AND Type = 'Joint Venture' AND Group_Equity_Shareholding >= 40.0

records.question: What operate companies named Dragonair, incorporated in Hong Kong as subsidiaries, have flights with the vehicle flight number M2-F1 #13 flying at an altitude of at least 3650.0?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT operate_company.id FROM operate_company

WHERE flight.vehicle_flight_number = 'M2-F1 #13' AND flight.altitude >= 3650.0 AND operate_company.name = 'Dragonair' AND operate_company.type = 'Subsidiary' AND operate_company.incorporated_in = 'Hong Kong'

records.question: Which subsidiaries incorporated in Hong Kong operate as Cargo airlines that had flights in 1963 with vehicle flight number M2-F1 #14 traveling exactly at velocity 240.0?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT operate_company.id FROM operate_company
JOIN flight ON operate_company.id = flight.company_id
WHERE operate_company.incorporated_in = 'Hong Kong' AND flight.vehicle_flight_number = 'M2-F1 #14' AND flight.velocity = 240.0 AND operate_company.principal_activities = 'Cargo airline' AND operate_company.type = 'Subsidiary' AND flight.date LIKE '%1963%'
records.pred_sql: SELECT T1.id FROM operate_company AS T1 INNER JOIN flight AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.company_id WHERE T1.Incorporated_in = 'Hong Kong' AND T1.Type = 'Cargo airlines' AND T2.Date LIKE '1963%' AND T2.Vehicle_Flight_number = 'M2-F1 #14' AND T2.Velocity = 240.0
